column1: Wed, 2 May 2001 06:46:48 -0700 (PDT),eddie.zhang@enron.com,"tara.piazze@enron.com, matt.smith@enron.com",west pl daily morning report,"Tara and Matt,

Notice Kern web site was up this morning after experienced some period of down time yesterday.  I turned job for Kern cycle 3 back on early this morning and all the data were captured since the time it was down (5/1/2001).
